title: Improved Wolf AI
description: Wolves in vanilla are kind of useless. They attack stuff, sure, but then they just stand there while the loot despawns. This mod fixes that.
body:
# Improved Wolf AI

Wolves in vanilla are kind of useless. They attack stuff, sure, but then they just stand there while the loot despawns. This mod fixes that.

---

## Features

**Smart Hunting** - Wolves stop attacking once the target is dead. No more watching your wolf lunge at a corpse.

**Meat Collection** - After a kill, your wolf grabs the meat and brings it back to you.

**Hostile Detection** - Your wolf growls when hostile mobs are nearby. Works as an early warning system in caves or at night.

**Item Fetching** - Crouch and your wolf will fetch nearby item drops and bring them to you. Useful for cleaning up after a fight.

---

## How It Works

- Wolves still fight normally, they just stop when the job is done
- Crouch to signal your wolf to fetch items, stand up to cancel
- Growling doesn't interrupt combat or other behaviors
- Items are visually shown in the wolf's mouth while carrying

---

## Config

Everything can be toggled or adjusted in the config file:

- Enable/disable any feature
- Adjust detection ranges
- Change fetch behavior (crouch-only or always active)
- Tweak timing for growls and fetching

---

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.0.0+

---

## Notes

- Only affects tamed wolves
- Sitting wolves won't fetch, growl, or hunt
- Should work fine with other mods unless they completely overwrite wolf AI

---

Report bugs on the issue tracker. Suggestions welcome.
